principle: The owned AMDGCN decode-attention tile is the ORACLE. Every loop iteration is DELTA CLOSURE against it -- not open-ended lever search. A candidate must target a NAMED owned-vs-generated delta. 'Search got deep but the delta did not move' is a SEARCH_SPACE_BUG, not a reason to try more.

oracle.kernel: owned AMDGCN decode-attention tile: LDS K/V staging + v_dot2 + cross-lane reduction
oracle.promotion_authority: W==D + token-match (extra/qk_decode_runtime_overhead.py + extra/qk_decode_token_match_check.py). Isolated timing is DIAGNOSTIC ONLY (docs/decode-attention-pure-search-state-and-learnings-20260627.md:54-61).

blocker_kinds.meaning: owned uses a semantic/codegen primitive the generated path cannot express
blocker_kinds.action: add IR/lowering/search axis; PROVE codegen can express it

blocker_kinds.meaning: primitive exists but lands in the wrong place/layout/vectorization, fails the verifier, or is not route-bound
blocker_kinds.action: fix lowering/scheduler/verifier/route binding; verify it lands in the owned-equivalent position

blocker_kinds.meaning: generated expresses the semantics but loses time
blocker_kinds.action: attribute to an EXACT trigger (occupancy, VGPR, LDS, scratch, waitcnt, memory coalescing, dependency chain, instruction selection, launch/combine lifecycle), change that trigger, and PROVE it moved

blocker_kinds.meaning: candidate search is looping but the measured owned-vs-generated delta does NOT move
blocker_kinds.action: STOP candidate search; fix the generator/search-space/metric so candidates target the named delta. Deep looping without movement is a BUG.
classified_by: the loop itself: the named delta is unchanged across the searched candidates

blocker_kinds.meaning: the auditor cannot explain why owned still wins after the visible diffs are closed
blocker_kinds.action: improve ISA/lifecycle/timing attribution until it NAMES the hidden delta
classified_by: meta: no existing tool can name the residual delta

named_deltas.note: no knob axis; needs work-removal capability
bottom-line; closes only when others close

rules: Every candidate must target a named owned-vs-generated delta (targets_delta + blocker_kind).
Do NOT search knobs unless the auditor predicts which delta they move.
If candidates do not move the named delta -> classify SEARCH_SPACE_BUG, not 'try more'.
PROMOTABLE requires W==D + token-match; isolated timing is diagnostic only.
Exhaustion is valid ONLY when every owned-vs-generated delta is closed, proven unrepresentable, or blocked by a named INSTRUMENTATION_GAP.
Keep generator-only candidate authority and the append-only JSONL ledger.
named_deltas_authority: the PARITY MATRIX rows (bench/qk-owned-oracle-parity/latest.json) are the single source of truth for row IDs. Search-space axes' targets_delta and the generator --failed-rows MUST use these exact IDs.
